title: ecbolium genuflexum
intro: Ecbolium genuflexum, also known as the 'genuflexum' or 'genuflexum ecbolium', is a flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ecbolium genuflexum include its ability to relieve pain and reduce fever, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions such as wounds, burns, and eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and infusions, are often used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential side effects.
